fieldValues.value: Extra results beyond the recall floor are permitted for content matching

An implementation MAY include instances beyond the recall-floor set for content matching. Returning extra results (e.g. via stemming, phonetic matching, or semantic similarity) does not violate conformance. The recall floor is a minimum inclusion requirement, not a maximum.

Allowing extra recall enables advanced engines (full-text, vector) to go beyond exact substring matching without violating the contract. The fixture scenarios for content matching use exactMatch: false precisely because of this permission.
